x-enumeration-literals.name: PEP Check
x-enumeration-literals.description: RBI, FATF, Internal AML system Example: Politically Exposed Person screening

x-enumeration-literals.name: Watch List or Sanctions Check
x-enumeration-literals.description: OFAC, UN, EU, RBI lists Example: Screening against sanctions lists

x-enumeration-literals.name: Credit Worthiness Check
x-enumeration-literals.description: Credit Bureau (CIBIL, Experian) Example: Credit score, repayment capacity

x-enumeration-literals.name: Legal Jeopardy Check
x-enumeration-literals.description: Court Records, ROC, Insolvency Database Example: Pending litigation, bankruptcy

x-enumeration-literals.name: Fraud Risk Check
x-enumeration-literals.description: Internal fraud DB, External watchlists Example: Suspicious activity reports

x-enumeration-literals.name: KYC or Identity Verification
x-enumeration-literals.description: Aadhaar, PAN, Passport, Utility bills Example: Identity and address proof validation

x-enumeration-literals.name: AML or Transaction Monitoring
x-enumeration-literals.description: AML systems, STR filings Example: Unusual transaction pattern detection

x-enumeration-literals.name: Regulatory Compliance Check
x-enumeration-literals.description: RBI, SEBI, IRDAI, Local regulators Example: License/registration validation

x-enumeration-literals.name: Financial Stability Check
x-enumeration-literals.description: Balance sheets, audited financials Example: Net worth, liquidity ratio

x-enumeration-literals.name: Reputation or Media Check
x-enumeration-literals.description: Adverse media databases, news archives Example: Negative news, reputational risk
